title: Tailora
description: A marketplace concept for clothing alteration and custom fashion services, focused on user flow, virtual measurement, order tracking, and responsive interface design.

title: Personal Portfolio Website
description: A personal portfolio website built to showcase profile, skills, selected works, experiences, and creative digital interests.

title: Connected Instagram Feed Design
description: A connected social media feed design created for organizational publication, focusing on visual consistency, layout composition, and color harmony.

title: SolarPlan
description: A mobile app concept for homeowners to plan solar panel usage through energy cost calculation, vendor recommendations, PLTS education, maintenance reminders, and energy monitoring.

title: Poster Design Collection
description: A collection of poster designs created for academic, organizational, and creative publication needs, focusing on visual layout, typography, color harmony, and clear message delivery.
